mapper.select: select s.id, s.name, s.no, s.phone, s.gender, s.degree, s.id_card, s.is_college, s.address, s.graduation_date, s.clazz_id, c.name as clazzName, s.violation_count, s.violation_score, s.create_time, s.update_time from student s left join clazz c on s.clazz_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update student set violation_count = violation_count + 1, violation_score = violation_score + #{score}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select case degree WHEN 1 THEN '初中' WHEN 2 THEN '高中' WHEN 3 THEN '大专' WHEN 4 THEN '本科' WHEN 5 THEN '硕士' WHEN 6 THEN '博士' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value from student group by degree order by degree
select c.name as clazzName, count(s.id) as data from clazz c left join student s on c.id = s.clazz_id group by c.id, c.name order by c.id
